con:interface.name: authentication-service-binding
con:interface.definition: C:/temp/a2f-kit-sviluppo/Kit per lo sviluppo - A2F Ricetta Bianca Elettronica non a carico SSN - ver. 20231127/wsdl/sts-a2f-service.wsdl

con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="authentication-service-port-type" targetNamespace="http://wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:as="http://authservice.xsd.wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it"> <wsdl:documentation>Versione 0.0.4</wsdl:documentation> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema elementFormDefault="qualified"> <xsd:import namespace="http://authservice.xsd.wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="sts-a2f-service.xsd"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="createReq"> <wsdl:part element="as:CreateAuthReq" name="CreateAuthReq"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="createRes"> <wsdl:part element="as:CreateAuthRes" name="CreateAuthRes"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="revokeReq"> <wsdl:part element="as:RevokeAuthReq" name="RevokeAuthReq"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="revokeRes"> <wsdl:part element="as:RevokeAuthRes" name="RevokeAuthRes"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="checkTokenReq"> <wsdl:part element="as:CheckTokenReq" name="CheckTokenReq"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="checkTokenRes"> <wsdl:part element="as:CheckTokenRes" name="CheckTokenRes"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="authentication-service-port-type"> <wsdl:operation name="create"> <wsdl:input message="tns:createReq"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:createRes"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="revoke"> <wsdl:input message="tns:revokeReq"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:revokeRes"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="checkToken"> <wsdl:input message="tns:checkTokenReq"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:checkTokenRes"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="authentication-service-binding" type="tns:authentication-service-port-type"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="create"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it/create"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="revoke"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it/revoke"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="checkToken"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it/checkToken"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="authentication-service"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:authentication-service-binding" name="authentication-service-port"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:9080/sts-a2f-auth-ws/soap/v1/authentication-service"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema attributeFormDefault="unqualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://authservice.xsd.wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://authservice.xsd.wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:dt="http://datatype.xsd.wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it"> <xs:import namespace="http://datatype.xsd.wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it" schemaLocation="sts-a2f-service-data-type.xsd"/> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 0.0.4</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:element name="CreateAuthReq" type="CreateAuthReq"></xs:element> <xs:element name="CreateAuthRes" type="CreateAuthRes"></xs:element> <xs:element name="RevokeAuthReq" type="RevokeAuthReq"></xs:element> <xs:element name="RevokeAuthRes" type="RevokeAuthRes"></xs:element> <xs:element name="CheckTokenReq" type="CheckTokenReq"></xs:element> <xs:element name="CheckTokenRes" type="CheckTokenRes"></xs:element> <xs:complexType name="CreateAuthReq"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="pinCode" type="dt:stringTypeMax256" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice PIN (in possesso del soggetto abilitato all’invio) cifrato.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="cfUtente" type="dt:cfType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>In base alla richiesta specifica può essere valorizzato con codice fiscale del medico o del titolare dell’erogatore.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codRegione" type="dt:codRegioneType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Regione / Provincia Autonoma di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in cfUtente.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codAslAo" type="dt:codAslType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice ASL di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in cfUtente.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codiceStruttura" type="dt:codStrutturaType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice della struttura di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in userId. Nel caso in cui il codice struttura non sia presente è necessario valorizzare con un a stringa di lunghezza 0.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="opzioni" type="dt:opzioni"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="CreateAuthRes"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codEsito" type="dt:esitoType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Esito della transazione: 0000=Esito positivo e restituzione dati, 0001=Esito positivo (con comunicazioni/warning) e restituzione dati, 9999=errore di sistema.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="errori" type="dt:errori"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="comunicazioni" type="dt:comunicazioni"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="RevokeAuthReq"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="pinCode" type="dt:stringTypeMax256" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice PIN (in possesso del soggetto abilitato all’invio) cifrato.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="cfUtente" type="dt:cfType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>In base alla richiesta specifica può essere valorizzato con codice fiscale del medico o del titolare dell’erogatore.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codRegione" type="dt:codRegioneType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Regione / Provincia Autonoma di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in cfUtente.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codAslAo" type="dt:codAslType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice ASL di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in cfUtente.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codiceStruttura" type="dt:codStrutturaType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice della struttura di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in userId. Nel caso in cui il codice struttura non sia presente è necessario valorizzare con un a stringa di lunghezza 0.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="token" type="dt:tokenType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>ID sessione ricevuto tramite l'operazione "create".</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="opzioni" type="dt:opzioni"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="RevokeAuthRes"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codEsito" type="dt:esitoType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Esito della transazione: 0000=Esito positivo e restituzione dati, 0001=Esito positivo (con comunicazioni/warning) e restituzione dati, 9999=errore di sistema.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="errori" type="dt:errori"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="comunicazioni" type="dt:comunicazioni"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="CheckTokenReq"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="pinCode" type="dt:stringTypeMax256" minOccurs="1"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice PIN (in possesso del soggetto abilitato all’invio) cifrato.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="cfUtente" type="dt:cfType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>In base alla richiesta specifica può essere valorizzato con codice fiscale del medico o del titolare dell’erogatore.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codRegione" type="dt:codRegioneType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice Regione / Provincia Autonoma di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in cfUtente.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codAslAo" type="dt:codAslType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice ASL di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in cfUtente.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codiceStruttura" type="dt:codStrutturaType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice della struttura di appartenenza del soggetto indicato in userId. Nel caso in cui il codice struttura non sia presente è necessario valorizzare con un a stringa di lunghezza 0.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="token" type="dt:tokenType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>ID sessione ricevuto tramite l'operazione "create".</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="opzioni" type="dt:opzioni"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Elenco campi opzionali.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="CheckTokenRes"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="codEsito" type="dt:esitoType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Esito della transazione: 0000=Esito positivo e restituzione dati, 0001=Esito positivo (con comunicazioni/warning) e restituzione dati, 9999=errore di sistema.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="errori" type="dt:errori"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="comunicazioni" type="dt:comunicazioni"/> <xs:element minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1" name="infoToken" type="dt:infoToken"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema attributeFormDefault="unqualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://datatype.xsd.wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://datatype.xsd.wsdl.auth.a2f.sts.sanita.finanze.it"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Versione 0.0.4</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <!--### SIMPLE TYPE ###################################--> <xs:simpleType name="stringTypeMax256"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="0"/> <xs:maxLength value="256"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codRegioneType"> <xs:restriction base="stringType3"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codAslType"> <xs:restriction base="stringType3"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="stringType3"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="3"/> <xs:maxLength value="3"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="codStrutturaType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="0"/> <xs:maxLength value="10"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="cfType"> <xs:restriction base="stringTypeCf"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="stringTypeCf"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="16"/> <xs:maxLength value="16"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="esitoType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[0-9]{4}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="tokenType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="36"/> <xs:maxLength value="36"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="stringTypeMax1"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="1"/> <xs:maxLength value="1"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <!--####################################################--> <!--### COMPLEX TYPE ###################################--> <xs:complexType name="errori"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" name="errore" type="errore"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="errore"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="tipoErrore" minOccurs="0" type="stringTypeMax1"/> <xs:element name="codEsito" type="esitoType"/> <xs:element name="descrEsito" minOccurs="0" type="stringTypeMax256"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="comunicazioni"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" name="comunicazione" type="comunicazione"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="comunicazione"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codice" type="stringTypeMax256"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Codice della comunicazione di servizio.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="messaggio" type="stringTypeMax256"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Testo comunicazione di servizio.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="opzioni"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="10" name="opzione" type="opzione"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="opzione"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="1" name="chiave" type="stringTypeMax256"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Chiave del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" name="valore" type="stringTypeMax256"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Valore del campo</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="infoToken"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="1" name="dataInizioValidita" type="xs:dateTime"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Data inizio validità</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="1" name="dataFineValidita" type="xs:dateTime"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Data fine validità</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <!--####################################################--> </xs:schema>
